issue_title: Attempted import error: 'useBlocker' is not exported from 'react-router-dom'.
issue_body_preview:
Getting Attempted import error:

package.json 
`{
  "name": "my-cms",
  "version": "0.1.0",
  "private": true,
  "dependencies": {
    "@camberi/firecms": "^1.0.0-beta2",
    "@emotion/react": "^11.4.1",
    "@emotion/styled": "^11.3.0",
    "@mui/icons-material": "5",
    "@mui/lab": "^
test_description_zh: 在项目中集成 firecms 并使用 react-router-dom，启动应用后访问首页，观察页面是否能正常加载渲染，控制台是否有导入错误。
expected_result_zh: 应用正常启动并渲染 firecms 界面，控制台不出现 'useBlocker is not exported from react-router-dom' 的导入错误，页面功能正常可交互。
